'''Qexis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a high-security research planet with only one [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. Few knew it existed.

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
